info.name: ReadBuddy - Book & BookVariant CRUD

variable.description: JWT Bearer token from login response

item.name: Book CRUD
item.description: Core book metadata APIs. Books contain shared info (title, author, etc). Language/format-specific data lives in BookVariant.

formdata.description: REQUIRED | String | Book title
REQUIRED | String | Author full name
OPTIONAL | String | Publisher name

formdata.value: An easy way to build good habits and break bad ones
formdata.description: OPTIONAL | String | Short summary/description
OPTIONAL | JSON String Array of Category ObjectIds | Get IDs from GET /api/categories
OPTIONAL | JSON String Array | Searchable tags
OPTIONAL | File | jpg/png/jpeg | Uploaded to Cloudinary, URL stored as coverImageUrl

request.description:
Creates a new book entry with core metadata.

Required fields: title, author
Optional fields: publisher, description, categories, tags, coverImage

Response includes the created book with _id.
Save _id as {{bookId}} for subsequent requests.

response.name: 201 - Success
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "_id": "667def456abc789012345678",
    "title": "Atomic Habits",
    "author": "James Clear",
    "publisher": "Penguin",
    "description": "An easy way to build good habits and break bad ones",
    "coverImageUrl": "https://res.cloudinary.com/xxx/image/upload/v123/uploads/abc.jpg",
    "categories": ["667abc123def456789012345"],
    "tags": ["habit", "productivity", "self-help"],
    "deleted_at": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-06-21T16:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-21T16:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

item.name: Get All Books (with variants & populated data)

response.name: 200 - Success

item.name: Get Book by ID (with variants & populated data)

request.description:
Returns a single book with all variants.

Same populated response structure as Get All Books but for one book.
Returns 404 if book is soft-deleted or doesn't exist.

response.name: 200 - Success

request.description:
Get books created in the last N days.
Change '7' in URL to any positive integer.

Returns same structure as Get All Books (with categories populated).

Get all books in a specific category.
Returns 404 if no books found for that category.

formdata.description: OPTIONAL | String
OPTIONAL | String
OPTIONAL | String
OPTIONAL | String
OPTIONAL | JSON String Array of ObjectIds | Replaces existing categories
OPTIONAL | JSON String Array | Replaces existing tags
OPTIONAL | File | Replaces existing cover image

request.description:
Update any book fields. All fields are optional — only send what you want to change.
Requires auth token.

Soft-deletes the book (sets deleted_at timestamp).
Book won't appear in any GET queries after this.
Requires auth token.

item.name: BookVariant CRUD
item.description:
BookVariant = one language edition of a book.
Each variant has a formats[] array containing different format types.

Format types: hardcover, paperback, ebook, audiobook, videobook

Files are uploaded via multipart/form-data and stored in Cloudinary.
Duration is auto-calculated from uploaded audio/video files.

Constraint: Only ONE variant per (bookId + language) combination.
Only the variant owner (donorId) can update/delete.

item.name: Create Variant - Hardcover Only (no file upload)

formdata.description: REQUIRED | ObjectId | Parent book's _id
REQUIRED | String | e.g. hindi, english, marathi, gujarati
REQUIRED | ObjectId | User creating this variant
REQUIRED | JSON String Array | Min 1 format object. See description for format fields.

request.description:
Create a variant with just a hardcover format.

Format fields for hardcover/paperback:
- type: REQUIRED | "hardcover" or "paperback"
- donorId: REQUIRED | ObjectId of donor
- isbn: OPTIONAL | String | ISBN-13
- copies: OPTIONAL | Number | Physical copies count
- available: OPTIONAL | Boolean | Is it available to borrow

item.name: Create Variant - Ebook with File Upload

formdata.description: REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | String
REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | JSON String Array | fileUrl & fileUrls auto-filled from uploaded files
UPLOAD | 1 or more files | PDF/EPUB | No limit on file count | URLs stored in fileUrls[] array, first file also in fileUrl

request.description:
Create variant with ebook format.

Upload PDF/EPUB files via 'ebookFiles' field.
You can upload multiple files (no limit).

Format fields for ebook:
- type: REQUIRED | "ebook"
- donorId: REQUIRED | ObjectId
- fileUrl: AUTO-FILLED | First uploaded file URL
- fileUrls: AUTO-FILLED | Array of all uploaded file URLs

item.name: Create Variant - Audiobook with File Upload

formdata.description: REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | String
REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | JSON String Array | parts[] needs partNumber & title only. Duration & totalDuration are AUTO-CALCULATED from files.
UPLOAD | MP3/M4A files | One file per part, in ORDER (1st file = part 1, 2nd = part 2, etc.) | No file count limit

request.description:
Create variant with audiobook format.

Upload audio files via 'audioParts' field.
Files are matched to parts IN ORDER.
Duration is AUTO-CALCULATED from each uploaded file.
totalDuration is AUTO-SUMMED from all parts.

Format fields for audiobook:
- type: REQUIRED | "audiobook"
- donorId: REQUIRED | ObjectId
- totalDuration: AUTO-CALCULATED | Number (seconds)
- parts[]: REQUIRED in formats JSON
  - partNumber: REQUIRED | Number (1, 2, 3...)
  - title: REQUIRED | String
  - audioUrl: AUTO-FILLED from upload
  - duration: AUTO-CALCULATED (seconds)

item.name: Create Variant - Videobook with File Upload

formdata.description: REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | String
REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | JSON String Array | Same as audiobook but uses videoParts field for upload
UPLOAD | MP4/WEBM files | One file per part, in ORDER | No file count limit | Duration auto-calculated

request.description:
Create variant with videobook format.

Same as audiobook but:
- Upload via 'videoParts' field
- Stores videoUrl instead of audioUrl

Format fields for videobook:
- type: REQUIRED | "videobook"
- donorId: REQUIRED | ObjectId
- totalDuration: AUTO-CALCULATED | Number (seconds)
- parts[]: REQUIRED in formats JSON
  - partNumber: REQUIRED | Number (1, 2, 3...)
  - title: REQUIRED | String
  - videoUrl: AUTO-FILLED from upload
  - duration: AUTO-CALCULATED (seconds)

formdata.description: REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | String
REQUIRED | ObjectId
REQUIRED | All 4 formats in one request
UPLOAD | PDF/EPUB for ebook format
UPLOAD | MP3/M4A for audiobook parts (in order)
UPLOAD | MP4/WEBM for videobook parts (in order)

request.description:
Create variant with all formats at once.
Upload all files together — server maps them to correct formats.

formdata.description: REQUIRED | JSON String Array | Min 1 format
UPLOAD | 1 or more PDF/EPUB files

request.description:
Add ebook format to an existing variant.

Use when you receive a new format later.
Only the variant owner (donorId) can add formats.
Returns 403 if not owner.

formdata.description: REQUIRED | JSON String Array | Only partNumber & title needed. Duration auto-calculated.
UPLOAD | MP3/M4A files in part order | No limit

request.description:
Add audiobook to existing variant.
Upload files in same order as parts in JSON.
Duration auto-calculated.

formdata.description: REQUIRED | JSON String Array | Only partNumber & title needed.
UPLOAD | MP4/WEBM files in part order | No limit

request.description:
Add videobook to existing variant.
Upload files in same order as parts.
Duration auto-calculated.

formdata.description: REQUIRED | JSON String Array | No file upload needed for physical books

request.description: Add hardcover/paperback format. No file upload needed.

item.name: Get All Variants for a Book

request.description: Get a single variant with all formats and populated donor info.

formdata.description: OPTIONAL | String | Change language
OPTIONAL | JSON String Array | REPLACES entire formats array
OPTIONAL | New ebook files if updating formats

request.description:
Update variant fields.

Only the variant owner (donorId) can update.
Returns 403 if not owner.

WARNING: Sending 'formats' REPLACES the entire array.
To add a format without losing existing ones, use POST /:id/formats instead.

Delete entire variant (all formats removed).
Only owner can delete. Returns 403 otherwise.

Remove one specific format from a variant.

Get formatId from the response: variant.formats[]._id

Only owner can remove. Returns 403 otherwise.
